sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, d1 Float64, d2 Float64, value Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 10.0, 3.0, randFisherF(10.0, 3.0)), (2, 100.0, 5.0, randFisherF(100.0, 5.0)), (3, NULL, 10.0, randFisherF(NULL, 10.0)), (4, 1.0, -1.0, randFisherF(1.0, -1.0));
SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value BETWEEN randFisherF(d1, d2) AND randFisherF(d2, d1) ORDER BY value;
SELECT id, d1, d2, RAND() AS random_val FROM (SELECT id, d1, d2 FROM test_table WHERE d1 BETWEEN 1.0 AND 100.0) subquery HAVING random_val > 0.5;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT id, randFisherF(COALESCE(d1, 1.0), COALESCE(d2, 1.0)) AS random_value FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;
SELECT id, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM (SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR d1 BETWEEN 0 AND 10) GROUP BY id HAVING total_value > randFisherF(5.0, 10.0);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (5, -5.0, 0.0, randFisherF(-5.0, 0.0)), (6, 0.0, 100.0, randFisherF(0.0, 100.0));
SELECT id, d1, d2 FROM (SELECT id, randFisherF(d1, d2) AS random_dist FROM test_table) WHERE random_dist BETWEEN -10 AND 10;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, d1, d2 FROM test_table WHERE d1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.d1, t2.d2 FROM test_table t1 JOIN temp_table t2 ON t1.d1 BETWEEN t2.d1 AND t2.d2;
